text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of a long and arduous
journey in the Twinkle Series for me and my
trainee. Her name is...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey, hey, guess who's ready to rumble!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whozza downtown girl ready to throw down?!
Starting today, Edo girl Inari is takin' on the
Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We've got one helluva road in front of us, so I'll
be countin' on ya, Boss!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We've got one helluva road in front of us, so I'll
be countin' on ya, Boss!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
The two of us are goin' be the next racing
sensation—that Twinkle Series won't know what
hit 'em!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
